headline: Telecom Stocks: No Signs SpaceX Bidding In FCC Spectrum Auction, But 2027 May Be Different
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX may not be taking part in the AWS-3 reauction. But telecom stocks AT&T, Verizon and T-Mobile may face a new worry in 2027.

headline: Is Alaska Air (ALK) Quietly Repositioning Its Brand With Boardroom Tech Talent And Lounge Investments?
summary: Alaska Air Group recently appointed former T-Mobile CEO Mike Sievert to its board, while also investing US$18 million in a new, larger Portland airport lounge as part of a broader lounge expansion plan. Sievert’s combination of large-scale digital leadership experience, aviation passion as a licensed pilot, and committee roles in Safety and Innovation could influence how Alaska Air Group balances operational rigor with customer-focused product upgrades.
